Get chosen · Kitchen & bath only

A website that turns lookers into booked jobs. You see it before you pay a dollar.

They’re already checking you out before they call. Your website is where they decide. I build the one that makes them decide on you, and you see the whole thing before you pay a cent.

Schedule your free strategy session →

They’re already on your site. This is where they pick.

They got your name or found you on Google. Before they call, they click to your website. That click is the moment they decide whether you’re the one.

Out of ten homeowners who land there, one is ready to call today. The other nine are still deciding. Most sites are built for the one and ignore the nine. The nine are most of your year.

Most sites make the best builder look like the worst.

The website most owners get sold is a pretty brochure. A stock kitchen that was never yours. A template she’s already seen on ten other sites that week.

It gives them no way to tell you apart. So they pick on price, or on whoever’s site looked like they’d actually pick up.

Your work is not the problem. The thing standing in for your work is.

I build the site that closes them.

Built right, your website is the best salesman you’ve ever had. It works while you’re cutting a countertop. It works at eleven at night while a homeowner decides who she’s calling in the morning.

It puts your real kitchens in front of them. Reviews from their street. Your number, one tap away. It answers what they’re nervous about and gives them enough to stop comparing and call you.

She lands just looking. She leaves ready to call.

I build it first. You pay after you’ve seen it.

You’ve cut a check to a marketer and got nothing back. I won’t ask you to do that again. So I go first.

Before you owe me a dollar, I design your homepage. Your kitchens, your market, your name on it, the real thing on your screen.

Love it, I build the rest at one flat price I quote up front: $1,500 for the standard build, or $4,500 fully custom. Don’t love it, you walk, and it cost you nothing.

You can’t get ripped off on a website you saw before you paid for it. You deal with me, the man who builds it, not a salesman who shakes your hand and vanishes the day you sign.

It pays for itself the first job it brings in.

One kitchen runs your customer twenty, thirty thousand dollars. Win a single homeowner who would have called someone else, and the site has paid for itself. Every job after that is money that used to go to the guy with the better-looking site.

Two ways to build it. Both see-it-first. Both yours to keep.

Standard

$1,500

The site most businesses need. Built to convert, live fast.

  • Five pages: home, services, gallery, about, contact
  • A proven layout that turns lookers into callers
  • Your real kitchens, reviews, and services loaded in
  • Quote form and click-to-call on every page
  • Fast on mobile, where she’s looking
  • Live in about two weeks
  • You see it before you pay a dollar

Custom

$4,500

For the business that wants to look like the top of the market.

  • A design built from scratch, a look nobody else in town has
  • Every service on its own page, built to rank and convert
  • Full project galleries with before-and-afters
  • Room to sell: your process, your story, your guarantees
  • Financing, online booking, or live chat added if you want it
  • Built so you look like the high-end choice right away
  • You see it before you pay a dollar

Most businesses start with Standard. Choose Custom if you’re a high-end business and your site needs to show it right away.

Book your free website strategy session →

This page is just the website. Done For You is everything.

A website on its own brings you more jobs. But it only works on the homeowners who already found you.

Done For You is the full package. It includes this same website, plus your Google rebuilt and run every month, a steady stream of reviews, AI search, and the guarantee that more homeowners call or I work for free.

One package, $750 a month, and you own all of it.

See everything Done For You includes →

See what your website could be doing. Free, in 30 minutes.

In 30 minutes I’ll show you exactly where homeowners are landing and leaving, what it’s costing you, and what to fix first. Written down, yours to keep, even if you never hire me.

Book your free 30-minute strategy session → 30 minutes. Kitchen and bath only.

— Shane Nguyen, Kitchen Websites

P.S. And if you want it built, you’ll see your new homepage before you pay a dollar. Worst case is a free plan. There’s no version where you come out behind.
